title: Addition polymerisation
summary: 9701 AS addition polymers — ethene to poly(ethene), repeat units, and environmental issues with PhET molecule builder.
learningObjectives: Define addition polymerisation and monomer requirements.
Draw repeat units from monomer structures.
Discuss disposal and environmental impact of polyalkenes.

simpleExplanation.title: From C=C to long chains
simpleExplanation.summary: Addition polymerisation opens the double bond to link monomers with no by-product. The repeat unit is the section shown in brackets.
steps: No atoms lost — contrast condensation polymers.

sections.content: **Addition polymerisation** (20.1) is tested with **drawing repeat units** from displayed monomers. Do not include the double bond in the repeat unit.
